## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style and conventions (pre-commit passes)
- [ ] Backend tests pass (`cd backend && python -m pytest -q`)
- [ ] Frontend builds (`cd frontend && npm run build`)
- [ ] Frontend tests pass (`cd frontend && npm run test -- --run`)
- [ ] New tests added for changed functionality
- [ ] API documentation updated in `API_DOCS.md` (if endpoints changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] `.env.example` updated (if environment variables changed)
